headline: Ripple Launches $1B RLUSD Stablecoin Amid XRP Surge

article.title: What Is RLUSD? Ripple’s XRP-Native Stablecoin Explained
article.summary: RLUSD is a regulated stablecoin issued by Ripple Labs — the firm behind the XRP blockchain — designed to maintain a steady value of one U.S. dollar per token. article.title: How Bitcoin ETFs Changed Institutional Adoption
